testcase.name: test_get_token

failure.message: RuntimeError: Install Flask with the 'async' extra in order to use async views.

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_auth.AuthTests testMethod=test_get_token>
def test_get_token(self): > rv = self.client.post('/api/tokens', auth=('test', 'foo')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_auth.py:15: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:1167: in post return self.open(*args, **kw) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/testing.py:235: in open response = super().open( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:1116: in open response_parts = self.run_wsgi_app(request.environ, buffered=buffered) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:988: in run_wsgi_app rv = run_wsgi_app(self.application, environ, buffered=buffered) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:1264: in run_wsgi_app app_rv = app(environ, start_response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:1498: in __call__ return self.wsgi_app(environ, start_response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:1476: in wsgi_app response = self.handle_exception(e) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask_cors/extension.py:178: in wrapped_function return cors_after_request(app.make_response(f(*args, **kwargs))) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:1473: in wsgi_app response = self.full_dispatch_request() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:882: in full_dispatch_request rv = self.handle_user_exception(e) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask_cors/extension.py:178: in wrapped_function return cors_after_request(app.make_response(f(*args, **kwargs))) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:880: in full_dispatch_request rv = self.dispatch_request() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:865: in dispatch_request return self.ensure_sync(self.view_functions[rule.endpoint])(**view_args) # type: ignore[no-any-return] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask_httpauth.py:174: in decorated return self.ensure_sync(f)(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/apifairy/decorators.py:113: in _response rv = f(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/apifairy/decorators.py:36: in wrapper return current_app.ensure_sync(f)(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:939: in ensure_sync return self.async_to_sync(func) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <Flask 'api.app'>, func = <function new at 0x106e0b9c0>
def async_to_sync( self, func: t.Callable[..., t.Coroutine[t.Any, t.Any, t.Any]] ) -> t.Callable[..., t.Any]: """Return a sync function that will run the coroutine function.
.. code-block:: python
result = app.async_to_sync(func)(*args, **kwargs)
Override this method to change how the app converts async code to be synchronously callable.
.. versionadded:: 2.0 """ try: from asgiref.sync import async_to_sync as asgiref_async_to_sync except ImportError: > raise RuntimeError( "Install Flask with the 'async' extra in order to use async views." ) from None E RuntimeError: Install Flask with the 'async' extra in order to use async views.
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:960: RuntimeError

testcase.name: test_get_token_in_body_only

failure.message: RuntimeError: Install Flask with the 'async' extra in order to use async views.

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_auth.AuthTests testMethod=test_get_token_in_body_only>
def test_get_token_in_body_only(self): self.app.config['REFRESH_TOKEN_IN_COOKIE'] = False self.app.config['REFRESH_TOKEN_IN_BODY'] = True > rv = self.client.post('/api/tokens', auth=('test', 'foo')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_auth.py:44: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:1167: in post return self.open(*args, **kw) self.run_wsgi_app(request.environ, buffered=buffered) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:988: in run_wsgi_app rv = run_wsgi_app(self.application, environ, buffered=buffered) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:1264: in run_wsgi_app app_rv = app(environ, start_response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:1498: in __call__ return self.wsgi_app(environ, start_response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:1476: in wsgi_app response = self.handle_exception(e) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask_cors/extension.py:178: in wrapped_function return cors_after_request(app.make_response(f(*args, **kwargs))) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:1473: in wsgi_app response = self.full_dispatch_request() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:882: in full_dispatch_request rv = self.handle_user_exception(e) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask_cors/extension.py:178: in wrapped_function return cors_after_request(app.make_response(f(*args, **kwargs))) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:880: in full_dispatch_request rv = self.dispatch_request() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:865: in dispatch_request return self.ensure_sync(self.view_functions[rule.endpoint])(**view_args) # type: ignore[no-any-return] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask_httpauth.py:174: in decorated return self.ensure_sync(f)(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/apifairy/decorators.py:113: in _response rv = f(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/apifairy/decorators.py:36: in wrapper return current_app.ensure_sync(f)(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:939: in ensure_sync return self.async_to_sync(func) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <Flask 'api.app'>, func = <function new at 0x106e0b9c0>
def async_to_sync( self, func: t.Callable[..., t.Coroutine[t.Any, t.Any, t.Any]] ) -> t.Callable[..., t.Any]: """Return a sync function that will run the coroutine function.
.. code-block:: python
result = app.async_to_sync(func)(*args, **kwargs)
Override this method to change how the app converts async code to be synchronously callable.

.. code-block:: python

testcase.name: test_edit_password

failure.message: RuntimeError: Install Flask with the 'async' extra in order to use async views.

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_users.UserTests testMethod=test_edit_password>
def test_edit_password(self): rv = self.client.put('/api/me', json={ 'password': 'bar', }) assert rv.status_code == 400 rv = self.client.put('/api/me', json={ 'old_password': 'foo1', 'password': 'bar', }) assert rv.status_code == 400 rv = self.client.put('/api/me', json={ 'old_password': 'foo', 'password': 'bar', }) assert rv.status_code == 200 assert rv.json['username'] == 'test' assert rv.json['email'] == 'test@example.com' assert 'password' not in rv.json
rv = self.client.post('/api/tokens', auth=('test@example.com', 'foo')) assert rv.status_code == 401 > rv = self.client.post('/api/tokens', auth=('test@example.com', 'bar')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
